text.name: Summoning Guide
text.description:
{Summoning Guide}

Adds all Summon Elementals to the hero's spellbook.
text.event: When you were busy preparing for your modest meal, a man approached you and introduced himself as a seller of foreign books. He was desperately trying to sell you his first book. Out of curiosity, you decided to take a look at what he had, and immediately realized that this fool had no idea what he owned. You agreed to buy one tome from him for a few pieces of silver and, advising him to do something else, you left, holding the Summoning Guide in your hands.
